name: Autumn Manager Bot
description: 🍂 Ultra-Advanced Telegram Group Management Bot with Tic-Tac-Toe, Fancy Text, X Downloader & more.

BOT_TOKEN.description: 🔑 Your Telegram Bot Token — get it from @BotFather

WELCOME_DELETE_AFTER.description: ⏱ Seconds before welcome card is auto-deleted (default: 600)

WEBHOOK_URL.description: 🌐 Your Heroku app URL e.g. https://your-app-name.herokuapp.com (leave blank to use polling instead)

PORT.description: 🔌 Port for webhook mode (Heroku sets this automatically)
